name: Picnic Chocolate Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions: Cream the shortening and sugar until well combined. Add the eggs, mixing thoroughly. Incorporate the applesauce, then sift in the dry ingredients and fold them into the creamed mixture. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13-inch baking pan. Sprinkle with sugar, chocolate chips, and chopped nuts. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
